title: 60-Second Lead Response for E-Commerce
metaDescription: Answer every e-commerce inquiry in under 60 seconds, in your voice, with your booking or product link. Done-for-you install by Ayothedoc.
excerpt: The 60-Second Lead Engine answers every e-commerce inquiry in under a minute, in your voice, so buyers do not cool off while you are packing orders or asleep.

sections.intro:
If you run an online store, you already know the math. A shopper fills in a contact form, asks about sizing, requests a wholesale quote, or messages your storefront at 11pm. By the time you reply the next morning, they have bought from someone else or forgotten you exist. Most e-commerce founders are busy picking, packing, fixing shipping issues, and chasing suppliers. Lead replies sit at the bottom of the pile.

The 60-Second Lead Engine is the free wedge of the Ayothedoc AI Operating System. Every new lead, from your contact form, storefront chat, marketplace messages, wholesale inquiry, or paid ad form, gets a reply in under a minute. The reply is written in your voice, references what they asked about, and includes the next step you actually want them to take, whether that is a product link, a discount code, a booking slot for a consult, or a wholesale order form. You stay the owner. The system just answers faster than you can.
sections.fourCFit:
This page sits in the Capabilities layer of the AIOS. Capabilities are the done-for-you workflows that draft, route, follow up, and report. Speed to lead is the first one we install because it pays back fastest. The other three layers carry it:

  • Context: your offers, voice, FAQs, shipping rules, return policy, and wholesale terms, so replies sound like you and never contradict your store.
  • Connections: live ties into your storefront, inbox, CRM, and booking tool, so the system sees the lead the moment it lands.
  • Cadence: a schedule that handles after-hours, weekends, and launch traffic without you babysitting it.

Capabilities without the other three turn into generic chatbots. With them, you get a reply that reads like a thoughtful founder wrote it.
sections.whatDoneLooksLike:
You will have a working speed-to-lead capability with a clear service level. Specifically:

  • Every new lead from your tracked sources gets a first reply in under 60 seconds, 24 hours a day.
  • Replies use your voice, reference the product or question, and include the right next step (product link, discount code, booking link, or wholesale form).
  • Common e-commerce questions (sizing, shipping times, returns, stock, custom orders) are answered correctly from your own policies.
  • Anything outside the script is flagged for you with a short summary, so you only step in when it matters.
  • Every lead lands in your CRM or chosen list with source, intent, and the reply that went out, so nothing leaks.
  • A weekly report shows volume, response time, reply samples, and any leads that still need a human touch.
sections.howWeInstall:
The install is the same three phases for every AIOS client. The wedge is free.

  1. Audit (free, about 10 minutes). You answer a short set of questions about your store, top lead sources, and what a good reply sounds like. Run the audit.
  2. Install (10 business days). We write the reply logic in your voice, connect your lead sources and CRM, load your policies and offers, and test against real past inquiries before going live.
  3. Operate (ongoing). Once live, we add one new automation per week on the paid tiers, tune replies based on what converts, and keep the SLA honest. See plans.
sections.expectedResults:
Grounded ranges from e-commerce installs:

  • First-response time drops from hours or overnight to under 60 seconds, including nights and weekends.
  • Reply-to-purchase or reply-to-booked-call rates typically improve by 20 to 60 percent, driven mostly by speed and consistency, not clever copy.
  • You recover 5 to 15 hours a week previously spent on repetitive inquiries, sizing questions, and wholesale back-and-forth.
  • Lost-lead leakage from after-hours messages drops close to zero on tracked sources.
  • Standing guarantee: across the full AIOS, you recover 40 or more hours a month or we keep working free until you do.
sections.faq:
Will the replies sound like a bot?

No. We write the reply patterns from your existing emails, product pages, and policies. Before launch, you read sample replies for your top 20 inquiry types and approve the voice. If something does not sound like you, we rewrite it.

What happens with questions the system cannot answer, like a damaged shipment or a custom request?

The system sends a short, honest holding reply in your voice, then flags the message to you with a one-line summary and suggested next step. You only see the inquiries that actually need a human.

Do I need to switch storefront, CRM, or helpdesk tools?

No. The AIOS is tool-agnostic and connects to the stack you already run on. If you change tools later, the capability moves with you. You own the logic, the prompts, and the data.
